Defenant Brian Baniqued'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default And Default Judgment

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defenant Brian Baniqued's Motion For Relief From Default And Default Judgment is continued to December 19, 2013 per stipulation and order on Oct. 31, 2013. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/EHG

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BRIAN BANIQUED'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

No appearances. Per Oct. 18, 2013 court order, motion to be heard on November 7, 2013 at 9:30am. The October 24, 2013 hearing is vacated. Courtesy copies must be delivered to Dept. 302 on the day of filing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff VILLA DEI FIORI OWNERS'ASSOCIATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BRIAN SANTOS BANIQUED and VILLA DEI FIORI CONDOMINIUMS, L.P.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
Judgment is entered in favor of Plaintiff VILLA DEI FIORI OWNERS' ASSOCIATION as follows:
1. By and against Defendants BRIAN SANTOS BANIQUED and VILLA DEI FIORI CONDOMINIUMS, L.P. as to Unit 410 for total damages in the sum of $29,601.26. Plaintiff, Villa Dei Fiori Owners' Association is further awarded $750,00 in attorney's fees.
2. By and agains Defendants BRIAN SANTOS BANIQUED and VILLA DEI FIORI CONDOMINIUMS, L.P. as to Unit 407 for total damages in the sum of $11,467.58. Plaintiff, Villa Dei Fiori Owners' Association, is further awarded $750.00 in attorney's fees.
WHEREAFORE, the total amount awarded to Plaintiff Villa Dei Fiori Owners' Association by Defendants Brian Santos Baniqued and Villa Dei Fiori Condominiums, L.P. is $42,568.84.

Judgment signed in open court.
